| SITRANS LR150 Radar level transmitter
Non-contact, HART, 15 m (49.2 ft) range, for liquids and solids. |  | 7ML534 | 0 | - | ● | A | ● | 0 | 7 | - |

SITRANS LR150 Overview
1
Overview
SITRANS LR150 is a compact radar transmitter for continuous level
measurement of liquids, slurries, and solids to a range of 15 m
(49.2 ft).
Benefits
• Bluetooth connectivity for easy setup with SITRANS mobile IQ.
• Optional HMI with pushbutton programming and local
